title: Verilator not handling hierarchical signal references correctly

features.name: hierarchical reference through nested if-generate blocks
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical dotted reference that traverses through multiple if-generate BEGIN labels to reach a module instance signal, such as DUT.A.B.C.D where A and C are if-generate blocks

features.name: hierarchical path through if-generate to cell
features.description: Code should include a scenario where a hierarchical reference finds a BEGIN statement instead of a CELL when traversing through if-generate blocks, causing Verilator to report that a variable does not exist

extraction_summary.notes: No code blocks in original issue; features synthesized from detailed hierarchical path description
